title: Phase 1 S2 领域核心 (Drizzle schema + 状态机 + 权限矩阵 + 审计事务)

features.title: Drizzle Schema + Initial Migration
features.description: 在 apps/web/db/schema.ts 引入 11 张 KEPLAR 业务表的 Drizzle SQLite 定义(users / goal_spaces / node_boards / node_board_members / sessions / agent_executions / cards / state_transitions / human_confirmations / audit_entries / realtime_events),UUID 主键用 text + lower(hex(randomblob(16))) 默认,JSONB 用 text + JSON.parse/stringify,deleted_at 软删除,created_at/updated_at 默认 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP。partial unique index 用 sql`...` 块补。导出 enum literal union(goalSpaceStatus / cardState / nodeBoardStatus / sessionStatus / agentExecutionStatus / transitionActor / confirmationStatus / confirmationTriggerType / userRole / entityType / actorType / riskLevel)与 InferSelectModel/InferInsertModel 类型。新增 package.json scripts: db:generate / db:migrate / db:check / db:studio。生成 0001_*.sql 迁移并应用,sqlite3 .tables 列出 11 张表。S2 不引入 API / UI / AI executor。
acceptance_criteria: AC-1.1 apps/web/db/schema.ts 导出 11 张 Drizzle SQLite 表定义 + 全部 enum literal union + InferSelectModel/InferInsertModel 类型,pnpm --filter web typecheck 0 errors
AC-1.2 UUID 主键用 text + lower(hex(randomblob(16))) 默认,JSONB 用 text 默认 '{}' / '[]',created_at/updated_at 默认 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,与 docs/specs/database_design.md § 3 字段类型与默认值完全一致

AC-1.3 partial unique index 用 sql`CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ... WHERE ...` 块补全:node_board_members (board, user) WHERE removed_at IS NULL、node_boards (goal_space, key) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL、cards (goal_space, display_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL、human_confirmations (card) WHERE status='pending'、realtime_events (goal_space, sequence)
AC-1.4 enum literal union 值集合与 database_design.md § 1 + state_transition.md § 1 + authorization_matrix.md § 2 完全一致(无遗漏枚举值,顺序不强制)
AC-1.5 apps/web/package.json 新增 scripts: db:generate (drizzle-kit generate)、db:migrate (drizzle-kit migrate)、db:check (drizzle-kit check)、db:studio (drizzle-kit studio,可选)
AC-1.6 跑 pnpm --filter web db:generate 在 apps/web/db/migrations/0001_*.sql 生成迁移,人工校对 + 补 partial index,pnpm --filter web db:check 0 errors
AC-1.7 跑 pnpm --filter web db:migrate 在干净 apps/web/db/dev.db 应用 0001 成功,sqlite3 apps/web/db/dev.db '.tables' 列出全部 11 张表
AC-1.8 apps/web/README.md 增补 'Database' 段,含 11 张表概览 + db:generate / db:migrate / db:check 用法
AC-1.9 __tests__/schema.test.ts 验证 enum literal union 值集合与 3 个真相源文档完全一致
test_needs: Vitest unit test for enum consistency
drizzle-kit check 验证 schema 一致性
definition_of_done: Required tests pass (vitest 26/26 S1 + F-001 新增 it 全绿)
Required verification matrix items pass (typecheck/lint/format:check/test/build/db:check/db:migrate 0 errors 0 warnings)

features.title: Card & Goal Space State Machines
features.description: apps/web/src/lib/state-machine/ 实现纯函数 Card 7 态(backlog/todo/dev/review/done/blocked/cancelled)与 Goal Space 4 态(draft/active/completed/cancelled)状态机。Card 按 state_transition.md § 4 转移表实现 canTransition/assertTransition/isTerminalState/getRequiredActor,trigger 名与 § 6 TransitionTrigger 一致(11 个 trigger)。Goal Space 实现 canGoalSpaceTransition/assertGoalSpaceTransition/isGoalSpaceTerminal,其中 assertGoalSpaceTransition 对 active→completed 返回缺哪条前置(hasPendingConfirmation/hasBlockedCard/allCardsDoneOrCancelled)的列表;opts 在 F-004 审计事务包装器中由事务内查询填充。纯函数不依赖 Drizzle 实例,便于单测。S2 不引入 API / UI / AI executor。
acceptance_criteria: AC-2.1 apps/web/src/lib/state-machine/card.ts 导出 canTransition(from, to, trigger?): boolean / assertTransition(from, to, trigger?): void / isTerminalState(state): boolean / getRequiredActor(from, to): ActorType / isValidState(state): boolean / CARD_STATES / CARD_TRANSITIONS,pnpm --filter web test -- state-machine/card 全绿

AC-2.2 apps/web/src/lib/state-machine/goal-space.ts 导出 canGoalSpaceTransition / assertGoalSpaceTransition / isGoalSpaceTerminal / GOAL_SPACE_STATES,pnpm --filter web test -- state-machine/goal-space 全绿
AC-2.3 全部合法转移(state_transition.md § 4 表的 14 条 Card 规则)允许,至少 10 条非法转移拒绝,Done/Cancelled 终态不可再转
AC-2.4 角色分类正确:backlog→todo 需 ai_role(Backlog Refiner),todo→dev 需 ai_role(Dev Crafter),blocked→* 需 system 或 human(initiator),task_cancelled 需 human(initiator)或 system

AC-2.5 11 个 trigger literal 全部存在:dependencies_ready / context_complete / execution_start / evidence_submitted / review_passed / review_failed / human_confirm / human_reject / human_confirm_timeout / blocked_resolved / task_cancelled

AC-2.6 assertGoalSpaceTransition 对 active→completed 返回缺哪条前置的列表:缺 hasPendingConfirmation → ['hasPendingConfirmation'];缺 hasBlockedCard → ['hasBlockedCard'];缺 allCardsDoneOrCancelled → ['allCardsDoneOrCancelled'];全缺 → 三条都在;全满足 → 空数组
AC-2.7 __tests__/state-machine/card.test.ts 覆盖 ≥ 80% 行 + 全部 14 条合法转移 + ≥ 10 条非法转移 + 全部 11 个 trigger + 终态拒绝
AC-2.8 __tests__/state-machine/goal-space.test.ts 覆盖 ≥ 80% 行 + draft→active / active→completed / active→cancelled / draft→cancelled + 终态拒绝 + complete 前置条件缺一/缺二/缺三
dependencies: F-001 (CardState / GoalSpaceStatus / TransitionTrigger enum literal union)
test_needs: Vitest unit test for card state machine (合法 + 非法 + 终态 + 角色 + trigger)
Vitest unit test for goal space state machine (转移 + 前置条件)
Vitest integration test for F-001 enum 联动
definition_of_done: Required tests pass (F-002 新增 it 全绿)
Required verification matrix items pass (5 条 baseline 命令 0 errors 0 warnings)

features.title: Authorization Matrix
features.description: apps/web/src/lib/authorization/ 实现纯函数权限矩阵,actor 抽象 Actor { id, role: 'initiator'|'chain_user'|'viewer' } + 资源归属。8 个 can 函数:canReadGoalSpace / canManageGoalSpace(initiator only) / canReadNodeBoard(initiator 全可见,非 initiator 需为有效成员) / canManageNodeBoard(initiator only) / canManageNodeBoardMembers(initiator only) / canReadCard(initiator 全可见,非 initiator 限本节点/本人) / canMutateCard(viewer 禁止,chain_user 限本节点/本人) / canDecideConfirmation(initiator only) / canExecuteCard(组合访问权 + 无 pending confirmation)。assertAccess(boolean, msg): void | throws ForbiddenError 抛错版本给 S3 handler。跨 goal_space_id 访问一律 false。每条 API 行(authorization_matrix.md § 4)+ initiator/chain_user/viewer × 每种资源 × allow/deny ≥ 30 case。S2 不引入真实登录,S3 注入 Actor from session。
acceptance_criteria: AC-3.1 apps/web/src/lib/authorization/ 下分文件导出 8 个 can 函数 + Actor/AccessResult/ResourceContext 类型 + assertAccess 抛错版本 + index re-export,pnpm --filter web test -- authorization 全绿
AC-3.2 canReadGoalSpace: initiator 自己的 goalSpace → true,initiator 别人的 goalSpace → true(initiator 全可见),chain_user/viewer 别人的 goalSpace → false(除非通过 node_board_members 获得访问权,S2 范围内 goalSpace 单层不需成员关系)
AC-3.3 canManageGoalSpace: 仅 initiator == goal_spaces.initiator_id 才 true;chain_user/viewer 一律 false
AC-3.4 canReadNodeBoard: initiator → true;非 initiator 需在 members 列表中(removed_at IS NULL)才 true;否则 false
AC-3.5 canManageNodeBoard / canManageNodeBoardMembers: 仅 initiator 才 true;非 initiator 一律 false
AC-3.6 canReadCard: initiator → true;非 initiator 需为卡片 node_board 的有效成员 OR assigned_to == actor.id 才 true;否则 false
AC-3.7 canMutateCard: viewer 一律 false;chain_user 需为有效成员 OR assigned_to == actor.id 才 true;initiator 全 true
AC-3.8 canDecideConfirmation: 仅 initiator == goal_spaces.initiator_id 才 true;chain_user/viewer 一律 false
AC-3.9 canExecuteCard(actor, card, members, hasPendingConfirmation): viewer → false;非 viewer 需卡片可访问(canReadCard) AND hasPendingConfirmation == false 才 true;否则 false
AC-3.10 assertAccess(true, msg) 不抛;assertAccess(false, msg) 抛 ForbiddenError(msg)
AC-3.11 跨 goal_space_id 访问一律 false(actor.goalSpaceId !== resource.goalSpaceId)
AC-3.12 __tests__/authorization/ 6 个测试文件,共 ≥ 30 case,覆盖 initiator/chain_user/viewer × 资源 × allow/deny 全组合
dependencies: F-001 (UserRole / CardState / NodeBoardStatus enum literal union)
test_needs: Vitest unit test for goal space authorization
Vitest unit test for node board authorization
Vitest unit test for card authorization
Vitest unit test for confirmation authorization
Vitest unit test for execute authorization (组合 + pending confirmation)
Vitest unit test for assertAccess (true 不抛 / false 抛 ForbiddenError)
definition_of_done: Required tests pass (F-003 新增 it 全绿,≥ 30 case)
Required verification matrix items pass (5 条 baseline 命令 0 errors 0 warnings)

features.title: Audit Transaction Wrapper
features.description: apps/web/src/lib/audit/ 实现 runWithAudit(db, ctx, fn) 高阶函数,业务变更 + audit_entries 写 + 可选 realtime_events 写同事务;audit 失败回滚主操作;realtime sequence 单调递增(用单 SQL INSERT ... SELECT max(sequence)+1 FROM realtime_events WHERE goal_space_id = ? 解决并发覆盖);不导出 updateAuditEntry / deleteAuditEntry / truncateAudit(append-only 由 API 边界 enforce)。apps/web/src/lib/db/client.ts 辅助导出 getDb() 返回 Drizzle 实例 + better-sqlite3 连接。S2 不引入 API handler / SSE / AI executor,audit wrapper 由 S3 调用。
acceptance_criteria: AC-4.1 apps/web/src/lib/audit/run-with-audit.ts 导出 runWithAudit(db: DrizzleDb, ctx: AuditContext, fn: (tx) => Promise<T>): Promise<T>,AuditContext 含 entityType / entityId / actor / action / beforeState? / afterState? / details? / skipRealtime?,pnpm --filter web typecheck 0 errors
AC-4.2 同事务原子性:fn(tx) 执行 + tx.insert(auditEntries).values(...) 写 audit + (skipRealtime 默认 false) tx.insert(realtimeEvents).values({sequence: max+1}) 写 realtime 三段全部提交成功;任何一个 throw 则全部回滚
AC-4.3 audit 写失败 → 业务回滚:fn 已 insert 一行 users,audit insert 抛错,该 users 行不在 db 中(SELECT 验证)
AC-4.4 realtime sequence 单调递增:连续 10 次 runWithAudit 在同一 goalSpaceId 下,realtime_events.sequence 严格 1..10
AC-4.5 跨 goalSpaceId 的 sequence 互不影响:goalSpaceA sequence 1..3,goalSpaceB sequence 1..5,各自从 1 开始递增
AC-4.6 skipRealtime: true 不写 realtime_events,只写 audit_entries
AC-4.7 append-only 边界:@/lib/audit 不导出 updateAuditEntry / deleteAuditEntry / truncateAudit / dropAuditTable / removeAuditEntry,静态 import 检查通过
AC-4.8 apps/web/src/lib/db/client.ts 导出 getDb() 返回 Drizzle + better-sqlite3 实例,db 文件路径 apps/web/db/dev.db,不引入新依赖
AC-4.9 __tests__/audit/run-with-audit.test.ts 4 个 case 覆盖:业务+audit+realtime 三段成功 / 业务成功+audit 失败回滚 / 连续 10 次 sequence 严格递增 / skipRealtime 不写 realtime
AC-4.10 __tests__/audit/append-only.test.ts 静态 import 检查 4 个名字均未导出
dependencies: F-001 (audit_entries / realtime_events / cards / users schema + 字段类型)
F-002 (assertGoalSpaceTransition 用于 complete 前置条件校验,可选)
test_needs: Vitest + better-sqlite3 in-memory test for runWithAudit (4 case)
Vitest static import check for append-only boundary
Vitest integration test for F-001 schema 联动 (实际 insert + select)
definition_of_done: Required tests pass (F-004 新增 it 全绿)
Required verification matrix items pass (5 条 baseline 命令 0 errors 0 warnings,含 vitest jsdom 与 better-sqlite3 兼容性)
